name: wf-orchestrator
description: ⚡ WF Orchestrator — Enhanced multi-agent workflow engine on top of Claude Code official Dynamic Workflows. Features: Agent SDK bridge, multi-model routing (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus per task role), cross-platform (DeepSeek/OpenRouter compatible), reusable templates, pre-execution DAG visualization, Markdown execution reports. Use /wf to start. Note: /workflow is now handled by official Claude Code.
